forbidden.title: You don't have access to this page
forbidden.description: The Admin Panel is restricted to Bosla staff. If you believe this is a mistake, contact an administrator.

emptyState.defaultDescription: This section is part of the Admin Panel foundation — its editor hasn't been built yet.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: An overview of Bosla's content and operations.
dashboard.welcomeDescription: This is the foundation of the Admin Panel — section editors, uploads, and forms are coming in later steps.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of Bosla's content and operations.

homepage.label: Homepage CMS
homepage.description: Edit the homepage's sections, order, and visibility.

navigation.label: Navigation
navigation.description: Manage header and footer navigation links.

footer.label: Footer
footer.description: Edit the footer's tagline, social links, and newsletter copy.

media.label: Media Library
media.description: Browse and manage uploaded images and assets.

seo.label: SEO
seo.description: Manage sitewide and per-page search metadata.

instructors.label: Instructors
instructors.description: Review applications and manage instructor profiles.

courses.label: Courses
courses.description: Moderate and curate the course catalog.

categories.label: Categories
categories.description: Manage the course category cards shown on the homepage.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Curate the student reviews featured on the homepage.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.description: Manage the homepage's frequently asked questions.

audit.label: Audit Log
audit.description: Review a history of admin actions.

homepageEditor.pageDescription: Edit the homepage's sections, order, visibility, and SEO.
homepageEditor.sectionsOverviewDescription: Reorder, enable, or disable each section. Expand a section to edit its content.
homepageEditor.conflictError: This was changed by someone else while you were editing. Reload the page to see the latest version before saving again.
homepageEditor.networkError: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
homepageEditor.leaveConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Leave without saving?
homepageEditor.publishConflict: Someone else published while you were working. Status refreshed — review before publishing again.
homepageEditor.publishUnsavedConfirm: You have unsaved section edits that won't be included. Publish anyway?
homepageEditor.revertConfirm: This discards all draft edits and restores the last published version. Continue?
homepageEditor.revertSuccess: Draft restored to the last published version
homepageEditor.revertConflict: Someone else published while you were working. Status refreshed — review before reverting.

seo.title: SEO
seo.description: Sitewide search-result title, description, and social preview image for the homepage.
seo.ogImageHint: Existing Media Library asset ID — a picker is coming in a future step.

hero.title: Hero
hero.description: The homepage's opening section — headline, description, CTA buttons, badges, statistics, and instructor slides.
hero.imageHint: Existing Media Library asset ID — a picker is coming in a future step. Leave blank to keep the decorative illustration.
hero.slideHint: Existing instructor ID — a picker is coming in a future step.

featuredCourses.title: Featured Courses
featuredCourses.description: The courses section's heading copy. Which courses appear is not yet CMS-driven — see the field hint below.
featuredCourses.subtitle: Subtitle
featuredCourses.courseIdsHint: Not yet shown on the live homepage — the public Featured Courses section still shows every course until a real Courses table exists.

whyBosla.title: Why Bosla
whyBosla.description: The platform's differentiator pillars — heading and a reorderable list of cards.
whyBosla.subtitle: Subtitle

learningExperience.title: Learning Experience
learningExperience.description: Heading and capability bullets. The lesson-player mockup is decorative and not editable.
learningExperience.subtitle: Subtitle

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Section heading only — the testimonials shown are sourced from student reviews, not authored here.
testimonials.subtitle: Subtitle

faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Heading and the question/answer list shown on the homepage.
faq.question: Question
